title: Coffee Craft
description: Make coffee and defeat all the enemies!
body:
# Description
This modpack will immerse you in adventures where you can:
- craft food to become stronger
- explore new biomes and dungeons
- fight with new weapons
- develop technologies
- and many others...
- **we add server zip file in releases, play with friends!**

# Modpack functionality:
- cooking mods _(create coffee and attack enemys!)_
- create mods
- weather seasons mod
- temperature mod
- backpacks mod
- new biomes and dungeons mods
- more nature mods
- more effects mods
- better villages mods
- more farms mods
- outvoted and forgotten mobs mod
- more evil mobs mods
- diet mod
- map mod
- redesigned end mods
- redesigned many mobs mods
- improved combat mods
- new decoratives mods
- many atmospheric mods (sound, design)

# Trailer
[On Rutube](https://rutube.ru/video/cb3eeb77c1c8054deb91a8367aff9818/?r=wd)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rLuTU9pd958" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Additional
Especially for the players, we are leaving a seed here, which spawns a great village)

Seed: `3712194317707978054`

![Seed: 3712194317707978054](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfab190cc63c2fabef5fdf42293dc220e744b5b6.jpeg)

# Runing on FoldCraft Launcher

If you want to run the modpack in [Fold Craft Launcher](https://fcl-team.github.io/index.html) on android, then turn off these mods:
- Indium (indium\-1\.0\.31\+mc1\.20\.4\.jar)
- Iris (iris\-1\.7\.0\+mc1\.20\.1\.jar)
- Nvidium (nvidium\-0\.2\.6\-beta\.jar)
- Reese's Sodium Options (reeses\_sodium\_options\-1\.7\.2\+mc1\.20\.1\-build\.101\.jar)
- Sodium (sodium\-fabric\-0\.5\.8\+mc1\.20\.1\.jar)
- Sodium Extra (sodium\-extra\-0\.5\.4\+mc1\.20\.1\-build\.115\.jar)

_(you need a powerful device to run the mod pack!)_

Fold Craft Launcher - [GitHub](https://github.com/FCL-Team/FoldCraftLauncher)
